claimText: The 30th Conference of Parties (COP30) to the UNFCCC was held in Belem, Brazil, and coincided with the 10th anniversary of the Paris Agreement.
evidenceExcerpt: COP30 was held in Belem, Brazil, coinciding with the 10th anniversary of the Paris Agreement.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent COP locations and milestones.
distractorHooks: Claiming COP30 was held in Dubai or another city
Claiming it marked the 20th anniversary of the Kyoto Protocol

claimText: The UNFCCC COP30 summit concluded with the adoption of the Belem Package.
evidenceExcerpt: The summit concluded with the adoption of the Belem Package by 195 Parties.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching climate packages to their respective COPs.
distractorHooks: Associating the Belem Package with UNCBD or UNCCD
Associating the Belem Package with a different UNFCCC COP

claimText: The UNFCCC emerged from the 1992 Earth Summit at Rio de Janeiro and is one of the three Rio Conventions.
evidenceExcerpt: UNFCCC emerged from the 1992 Earth Summit at Rio de Janeiro and is one of the three Rio Conventions (along with UNCBD and UNCCD).
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin of international environmental conventions.
distractorHooks: Claiming it emerged from the 1972 Stockholm Conference
Claiming it is not a Rio Convention

claimText: The UNFCCC is responsible for releasing the Nationally Determined Contributions (NDC) Synthesis Report.
evidenceExcerpt: The UNFCCC releases the NDC Synthesis Report.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching reports to their publishing organizations.
distractorHooks: Attributing the NDC Synthesis Report to UNEP
Attributing the report to the IPCC

claimText: The UNFCCC is headquartered in Bonn, Germany, and India is a member state.
evidenceExcerpt: UNFCCC has 198 signatories (including India) and is headquartered in Bonn, Germany.
examUse: Institution-feature question regarding UNFCCC membership and headquarters.
distractorHooks: Claiming the headquarters is in Geneva or Nairobi
Claiming India is an observer but not a member
